retrieved_result: PGPR in my CHOCOLATE BAR! PGPR in my CHOCOLATE BAR!12 Replies My beautiful wife Nicole (who happens to be eight months pregnant) wrote this and I thought it would be a perfect guest blog post for Try Living Organic. Sugary cravings are a serious issue in most people’s lives and there are real dangers when we eat blindly. Alw
